---
title: "Plan d'actions Nemeton"
subtitle: "Fiche par UGF"
lang: fr
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - margin=2cm
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    fig-pos: H
    keep-tex: false
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: "DejaVu Sans"
params:
  data_file: ""
  language: "fr"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
data <- readRDS(params$data_file)
lang <- params$language

f_eur <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return("--")
  formatC(round(x), format = "d", big.mark = " ")
}
```

# `r data$project_name`

**`r if (lang == "fr") "Date d'edition" else "Issued"` :** `r format(Sys.Date())`
**`r if (lang == "fr") "Horizon" else "Horizon"` :** `r data$horizon` ans
**`r if (lang == "fr") "Nombre d'actions" else "Action count"` :** `r data$n_actions` (`r data$n_ugfs` UGF)

```{r totals}
totals <- data$totals
cat(sprintf(
  if (lang == "fr") {
    "**Cout total :** %s EUR  \n**Revenu total :** %s EUR  \n**Bilan :** %s EUR\n"
  } else {
    "**Total cost:** %s EUR  \n**Total revenue:** %s EUR  \n**Balance:** %s EUR\n"
  },
  f_eur(totals$cout), f_eur(totals$revenu), f_eur(totals$bilan)
))
```

\newpage

```{r per-ug, results = "asis"}
for (ug in data$ugfs) {
  cat("# ", ug$label, " (", ug$ug_id, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("**", if (lang == "fr") "Surface" else "Area", " :** ",
      formatC(round(ug$surface_ha, 2), format = "f", digits = 2),
      " ha\n\n", sep = "")

  if (length(ug$actions) == 0L) {
    cat(if (lang == "fr") "_Aucune action planifiee._\n\n"
        else                "_No action planned._\n\n")
    next
  }

  # Per-UGF totals
  cat("**", if (lang == "fr") "Cout" else "Cost", " :** ", f_eur(ug$cout),
      " EUR  ", "\n", sep = "")
  cat("**", if (lang == "fr") "Revenu" else "Revenue", " :** ", f_eur(ug$revenu),
      " EUR  ", "\n", sep = "")
  cat("**", if (lang == "fr") "Bilan" else "Balance", " :** ", f_eur(ug$bilan),
      " EUR\n\n", sep = "")

  # Action table
  hdr <- if (lang == "fr") {
    c("Annee", "Type", "Priorite", "Statut", "Cout", "Revenu", "Bilan",
      "Objectifs")
  } else {
    c("Year", "Type", "Priority", "Status", "Cost", "Revenue", "Balance",
      "Objectives")
  }
  cat("|", paste(hdr, collapse = "|"), "|\n",
      "|", paste(rep("---", length(hdr)), collapse = "|"), "|\n",
      sep = "")
  for (a in ug$actions) {
    cat("| ", a$annee_realisation,
        " | ", a$type,
        " | ", a$priorite,
        " | ", a$statut,
        " | ", f_eur(a$cout_eur),
        " | ", f_eur(a$revenu_eur),
        " | ", f_eur(a$bilan_eur),
        " | ", paste(a$objectifs_lies, collapse = ", "),
        " |\n", sep = "")
  }
  cat("\n\n\\newpage\n\n")
}
```
